The double-ring form reads as two celestial bodies in orbit around each other, locked and luminous. An Estelar drop earring that makes partnership structural.

name: Amazonia Cocar Lago Drops

story: Palma (palm) rendered in 18k yellow gold, single frond form dropping toward the shoulder. Diamonds accent the central vein, 0.27 carats marking the spine.

story: Coral Verde set in 18k yellow gold, large petal stud earrings where 3.65ct of green tourmaline centers sit among brushed gold lobes with 1.31ct of diamonds. The form reads as living coral. A Bahia stud of deep green coast.

name: Bahia Coral Azul Studs
description: Coral Azul studs in 18k yellow gold, large petal studs with London blue topaz centers. For the woman who wears the deep water close.
story: Coral Azul set in 18k yellow gold, large petal studs where 2.95ct of London blue topaz centers sit among brushed gold lobes with 1.31ct of diamonds. The blue stone makes the coral read as underwater. A Bahia stud of oceanic depth.

name: Amazonia Cocar Foliage Studs

name: Estelar Placa Drops

description: Brasa (ember) in 18k yellow gold, pink tourmaline cascading in articulated tiers, the jaguar lit by pink flame.Onsa statement earrings for the woman who creates her own light.
story: Brasa (ember) cascading in 18k yellow gold, pink tourmaline across articulated tiers with 1.68 carats of diamonds. Light pouring down in pink, the jaguar illuminated.

name: Onsa Costa Earrings
description: Costa (coast) in 18k yellow gold, white pearl falling in articulated chain. The jaguar meets the ocean.Onsa earrings for the woman who moves between worlds without breaking stride.
story: Costa (coast) swaying in 18k yellow gold, white pearl suspended from articulated links. The jaguar at the water, where forest meets shore.

description: Mata (wild) in 18k yellow and white gold, green tourmaline from both ears. The jaguar in the canopy, complete.Onsa earrings for the woman who is surrounded by green, growth, abundance and territory.

story: Farol (beacon) shining in 18k yellow gold, citrine and rutilated quartz in articulated descent with diamonds. Two kinds of gold falling together, the jaguar carrying its own light source.

description: Salto (leap) in 18k yellow gold, citrine and quartz in extended fall. The jaguar pouring light.Onsa earrings for the woman who commits fully to every move.
story: Salto (leap) launching in 18k yellow gold, citrine and rutilated quartz in extended articulated descent. The jaguar mid-leap, committed to the air.

story: Swirl in 18k white gold, drops where 2.33 carats of diamonds turn in a tight spiral like light caught spinning. Movement ced and held. Energy wound tight and held. A Luminus earring for the woman whose energy never sits still long enough to be pinned down.

description: Swirl in 18k yellow gold, a warm spiral of diamonds in motion. For the woman who sets the room turning.

name: Amazonia Cocar Festa Studs - Teal
description: Festa (party) in 18k gold, citrine, emerald and a mix of colour packed bright at the ear. For the woman the celebration follows.

name: Amazonia Cocar Voo Climbers

story: Folego (breath) in 18k white gold, studs where 2.49 carats of diamonds glow soft and full like a breath of light held at the ear. Calm made visible. Calm made fully visible. A Luminus earring for the woman whose presence lets a whole room finally exhale.

story: Cristal (crystal) in 18k white gold, studs where 1.65 carats of diamonds shine clear and faceted like cut crystal catching light. Brightness with nothing hidden in it. Brightness with nothing hidden in it. A Luminus earring for the woman whose honesty is the most disarming thing about her.

Organic scale worn with complete intent. A Bahia drop for the woman who was never meant to stay contained and stopped apologizing for it.

description: Sol (sun) in 18k yellow gold, a warm citrine glowing in a diamond huggie. For the woman who is the warmth, not its reflection.

name: Amazonia Buriti Fruta Huggies
description: Fruta (fruit) in 18k yellow gold, pink garnet and green tourmaline ripe in a diamond huggie. For the woman whose patience finally pays.

name: Amazonia Cocar Leito Climbers
description: Leito (riverbed) in 18k gold, imperial topaz running the ear like water over stone. For the woman who shapes whatever she moves through.

story: Reluz (gleams) in 18k white gold, drops where 2.75 carats of diamonds crowd together in a mass of bright points. Many lights gathered into one. Many lights gathered into one mass. A Luminus earring for the woman a room always seems to assemble itself around.

story: Streak in 18k white gold, drops where 2.75 carats of diamonds fall in a single bright line like a streak of light crossing a night sky. Quick, brilliant, gone before you can hold it. A Luminus earring for the woman whose passing is the thing the room talks about after.

description: Poeira (dust) in 18k white gold, studs fine as scattered dust of light. For the woman made of countless small lights.

description: Abraço (embrace) in 18k yellow gold, huggies that wrap the lobe like two slopes meeting. For the woman who holds close what she loves.

name: Dunas Alto Hoops
description: Alto (tall) in 18k yellow gold, narrow hoops rising upright against the horizontal. For the woman who stands tall in a flat landscape.
story: Alto (tall) in 18k yellow gold, narrow hoops of 1.61 carats of diamonds climbing upright like a dune that refuses to lie down across a flat horizon. Vertical against everything level. A Dunas earring for the woman who rises in rooms that expected her to stay low.

name: Dunas Pegada Studs

story: Pegada (footprint) in 18k yellow gold, studs of 0.25 carats of diamonds pressed clean and clear like a single footprint left in smooth sand. Proof that someone walked here first. A Dunas earring for the woman whose path others end up following without quite knowing why.

name: Dunas Crescent Studs
description: Crescent in 18k yellow gold, studs curved like the moon-shape a wind dune takes. For the woman who shapes herself to no one.
story: Crescent in 18k yellow gold, studs of 1.05 carats of diamonds curved in the crescent a barchan dune forms when the wind blows steady from one side. A shape made by force and still beautiful. A Dunas earring for the woman who was formed by hard conditions and came out elegant.

name: Dunas Sirocco Hoops
description: Sirocco in 18k yellow gold, a ribbon of diamonds twisting around a bold hoop. For the woman who arrives like weather.
story: Sirocco in 18k yellow gold, generous hoops wrapped in a spiraling ribbon of 2.03 carats of diamonds, the desert wind caught mid-turn and held. Substantial on the ear, alive in any light. A Dunas earring for the woman whose energy reaches the far corner of the room before she does.

name: Dunas Camadas Huggies
description: Camadas (layers) in 18k yellow gold, huggies stacked in fine ridged bands. For the woman with more beneath the surface than she shows.
story: Camadas (layers) in 18k yellow gold, huggies of 0.22 carats of diamonds built in fine stacked bands like the thin layers a dune reveals when it shifts. Each line a season pressed under the next. A Dunas earring for the woman who is far deeper than the first impression lets on.

name: Dunas Cruz Studs
description: Cruz (cross) in 18k yellow gold, studs where two ridge lines meet and cross. For the woman who decides at the crossing.
story: Cruz (cross) in 18k yellow gold, studs of 0.28 carats of diamonds where two ridge lines intersect like the place two wind-driven dunes finally cross. The point a direction is chosen. A Dunas earring for the woman who never freezes at the fork and always picks her way.

name: Dunas Oasis Studs
description: Oasis in 18k yellow gold, a pool of diamonds crowned with pink garnet blooms. For the woman who is the destination after the distance.
story: Oasis in 18k yellow gold, open ovals where 0.51 carats of diamonds pool inside a crown of 3.53 carats of pink garnet flowering at the rim. The promise the desert keeps, scaled to the ear. A Dunas earring for the woman everyone is relieved to finally reach.

name: Dunas Sulco Hoops
description: Sulco (furrow) in 18k yellow gold, hoops grooved with a single deep channel. For the woman whose mark runs deep.
story: Sulco (furrow) in 18k yellow gold, hoops of 0.43 carats of diamonds cut with one deep running groove like the channel wind carves down a dune flank. A line pressed in to stay. A Dunas earring for the woman who leaves a deeper impression than anyone expected from someone so quiet.

name: Dunas Twist Hoops
description: Twist in 18k yellow gold, hoops turned in a single clean spiral. For the woman who takes the turn and never loses her line.
story: Twist in 18k yellow gold, hoops of 0.23 carats of diamonds turned in one smooth spiral like sand lifting in a small rising column of wind. Motion held in metal. A Dunas earring for the woman who can change direction completely without ever losing her footing.

name: Dunas Sopro Studs
description: Sopro (a breath of wind) in 18k yellow gold, small studs light as a single gust. For the woman who changes things with a whisper.
story: Sopro (a breath or gust of wind) in 18k yellow gold, studs of 0.16 carats of diamonds light and brief as the single breath of wind that starts a whole dune moving. The smallest cause of the largest shift. A Dunas earring for the woman whose quietest word sets everything in motion.

name: Dunas Crista Studs
description: Crista (crest) in 18k yellow gold, studs rising to the sharp top edge of a dune. For the woman who lives at the high edge.
story: Crista (crest) in 18k yellow gold, studs of 0.37 carats of diamonds rising to the fine sharp line where a dune meets the sky at its very top. The edge between climb and fall. A Dunas earring for the woman who is most herself right at the highest point.

name: Bahia Arara Drops
description: Arara (macaw) in 18k yellow gold, a golden feather flying citrine, pink garnet, pink sapphire and tanzanite. For the woman in full color.
story: Arara (macaw) in 18k yellow gold, a feathered drop carrying 1.62 carats of citrine, pink garnet, pink sapphire and tanzanite down its spine with 0.17 carats of diamonds. The boldest bird of the coast, translated to the ear. A Bahia drop for the woman who never dresses to disappear.

name: Bahia Quill Drops
description: Quill in 18k yellow gold, a long golden feather with a diamond spine. For the woman who writes her own terms.
story: Quill in 18k yellow gold, a full-length feather with fine leaflets curling away from 0.74 carats of diamonds set along the spine. Movement in every step she takes, intention in every line it draws. A Bahia drop for the woman whose story has only ever had one author. Everyone can tell.

name: Bahia Wisp Drops
description: Wisp in 18k yellow gold, a light feather drop traced with diamonds. For the woman whose lightest touch still leaves a mark.
story: Wisp in 18k yellow gold, a delicate feather drawn in fine leaflets with 0.56 carats of diamonds running the center line. Barely there in weight, fully there in effect, the lightest piece with the longest afterimage. A Bahia drop for the woman who proves presence was never about volume.

name: Bahia Baiana Earring
description: Baiana in 18k yellow gold, ruffles of gold gathered in full sway with scattered diamonds. For the woman who is the celebration.
story: Baiana in 18k yellow gold, ruffled folds gathered into a full open silhouette with 0.85 carats of diamonds caught in the flounces. Named for the women of Bahia whose white skirts turned movement into ceremony. A Bahia earring for the woman whose entrance needs no music, though it usually gets some.

name: Bahia Mimosa Studs
description: Mimosa in 18k yellow gold, a golden burst of filaments crowned with diamonds. For the woman in permanent bloom.
story: Mimosa in 18k yellow gold, a domed burst of fine golden rays tipped with 0.49 carats of diamonds, the mimosa flower at the moment it pops. Joyful, exact and impossible to ignore at any distance. A Bahia stud for the woman whose optimism is a strategy, not an accident of mood.

name: Bahia Mimosa Rosa Studs
description: Mimosa Rosa in 18k yellow gold, the golden burst warmed with pink garnets and diamonds. For the woman who blushes on purpose.
story: Mimosa Rosa in 18k yellow gold, the burst of fine golden filaments now set with 1.53 carats of pink garnet and 0.42 carats of diamonds. Warmth layered over light, the same joy turned a shade more intimate. A Bahia stud for the woman who chooses her color the way she chooses everything, deliberately.

name: Bahia Bonita Grande Hoops
description: Bonita Grande (beautiful) in 18k yellow gold, full fluted crescents set with pink garnets and diamonds. For the woman who hears it everywhere.
story: Bonita Grande (beautiful) in 18k yellow gold, generous fluted crescents carrying 1.64 carats of pink garnet and 0.56 carats of diamonds through the gathered folds. The compliment, scaled up and worn without ceremony. A Bahia hoop for the woman who stopped needing to hear it and started simply enjoying it.

name: Bahia Concha Earring
description: Concha (shell) in 18k yellow gold, curled frond earring with diamonds scattered across the form. The coast carried at the ear. For the woman whose softness is structural.
story: Concha (shell) curling in 18k yellow gold, sculpted palm frond wrapping into itself with 1.01 carats of diamonds across the surface. The frond becomes the shell at the ear. Every Bahian form echoes another; leaf, wave, coast, curl.

name: Bahia Galho Drops
description: Galho (branch) in 18k yellow gold, branching fan drop earrings with diamond accents. For the woman who grows in the direction of the light.
story: Galho (branch) set in 18k yellow gold, drop earrings where multiple branches fan out with 0.72ct of diamonds at each fork. The form reads as a coral branch system. A Bahia drop of golden branching.

name: Bahia Cabana Huggies
description: Cabana in 18k yellow gold, ribbed golden stripes lined with diamonds, close to the ear. For the woman with a standing reservation.
story: Cabana in 18k yellow gold, huggies fluted in crisp parallel ribs with 0.72 carats of diamonds dotting the lines like light through the slats. Beach-club ease promoted to jewelry-box rank, leisure with excellent posture. A Bahia huggie for the woman who takes her rest as seriously as her work.

name: Bahia Alga Huggies
description: Alga (seaweed) in 18k yellow gold, open leaf-form huggies with diamond accents. For the woman who lets things grow without restraining them.
story: Alga (seaweed) set in 18k yellow gold, open huggies where flowing leaf forms carry 0.55ct of diamonds. The organic shape reads as seaweed swaying in current. A Bahia huggie of underwater movement.

name: Bahia Pétala Earring
description: Pétala (petal) in 18k yellow gold, delicate double frond earring on hook with pink garnet. Color embezelling from the ear. Bahia earring for the woman who blooms in the details.
story: Pétala (petal) falling in 18k yellow gold, twin palm frond forms on French wire with pink garnet nestled at the fold points and 0.31 carats of diamonds. Small, intentional, precisely pink, the detail that makes the difference between wearing jewelry and being dressed.

name: Estelar Aurora Drops
description: Aurora (dawn) - Teardrop earrings with ruby accent in yellow and white gold. Estelar drops for the woman the morning was waiting for.
story: Aurora (dawn) dawning in 18k yellow and white gold, ruby at center of filigree drops with 2.51 carats of diamonds. First light breaking through the structure.

name: Tribal Cerca Earrings
description: Cerca (fence) in 18k gold with black rhodium, a green emerald star locked in spokes. Tribal studs for the woman who guards her own.
story: Cerca (fence) in 18k gold finished in black rhodium, emerald at 1.28 carats held at the centre of a radiating spoked frame. The sacred mark pressed into a shield and fenced in, colour kept deliberately inside the line. Protection drawn as geometry, the dark metal holding the green.

name: Mirage Sway Yellow Drops - Yellow
description: Sway (sway) in 18k yellow gold, a wavering line set with yellow topaz. Mirage drops for the woman who bends and never breaks.
story: Sway (sway) in 18k yellow gold, a fine undulating line with yellow topaz scattered along the wave and diamonds between. Clear yellow catching each bend the way light catches moving water. Colour that ripples down the ear, the Mirage glow in motion. Set with 0.27 carats of diamonds that keep the colour lit from every side.

name: Luminus Dusk Climbers
description: Dusk in 18k white gold, black diamond climbers in the deep light of nightfall. For the woman who owns the late hour.
story: Dusk in 18k white gold, climbers where 4.55 carats of black diamonds rise up the ear in the deep low light of the day letting go. The hour after the sun. A Luminus earring for the woman who was always more herself once the light went soft and low.

name: Mirage Cristal Dangles - Blush

The most opulent Mirage earring, colour caught and thrown in every direction. Set with 0.67 carats of diamonds that keep the colour lit from every side.

description: Candeia ( lamp) in 18k white gold, blue topaz glowing beneath diamond light. For the woman who is the calm flame.

description: Candeia (lamp) in 18k yellow gold, black quartz and tanzanite aglow with warm diamond light. For the woman who holds the warm flame.

description: Mosaic (mosaic) in 18k white gold, small stones set close in green emerald. Mirage drops for the woman who is made of many things.
story: Mosaic (mosaic) in 18k white gold, cut stones fitted together tile by tile in green emerald with diamonds worked between. Colour assembled from many small pieces into one whole, light catching each facet at its own angle. The Mirage idea built up rather than poured.

story: Ala (wing) in 18k white gold, a row of graduated quills opening in a fan that sweeps along the ear with 0.73 carats of diamonds tipping the spread. The wing held half-open, the moment of tension just before it lifts. Tribal movement caught at its widest point and made cool.

description: Ala (wing) in 18k yellow gold, fine quills fanning across the ear. Tribal earrings for the woman who takes her space.

The form reads as a magnifying lens, the lattice framework a precision instrument that enlarges light. An Estelar dangle of serious scale and purpose.

description: Ninho (nest) in 18k yellow gold, substantial, radiating cuff, what holds and protects. Tribal cuff for the woman who protects everything she builds.
story: Ninho (nest) wrapping in 18k yellow gold, substantial radiating forms with 1.33 carats of diamonds circling the wrist. The structure built from gathered grasses is designed to cradle.

name: Estelar Dawn Bangle
description: Topaz in 18k yellow gold, a lattice bangle with yellow sapphire accents and diamond intersections. For the woman who wears sunlight as structure.
story: Topaz set in 18k yellow gold, a hinged lattice bangle where 1.10ct of yellow sapphire glows within a geometric framework traced by 1.70ct of diamonds. The golden stone and golden wire merge into a unified celestial warmth. An Estelar bangle that collapses the distance between star and skin.

name: Estelar Meia Lua Cuff
description: Meia Lua (half moon) is a cuff bangle in yellow gold with lattice detail. Estelar cuff for the woman who knows that partial can be powerful.
story: Meia Lua (half moon) arcing in 18k yellow gold, open cuff with star-pattern filigree and 0.37 carats of diamonds. Half the sky, all the intention.

name: Estelar Crivo White Cuff
description: Crivo (sieve) in 18k white gold, a wide lattice cuff with diamond intersections across every panel. For the woman who filters everything through brilliance.
story: Crivo (sieve) forged in 18k white gold, a wide cuff where angular lattice panels span the wrist with 3.57ct of diamonds at each crossing. The open metalwork reads as a screen that catches light and lets shadow pass through. An Estelar cuff that transforms the wrist into a constellation band.

name: Estelar Crivo Yellow Cuff
description: Crivo (sieve) in 18k yellow gold, a wide lattice cuff with diamond intersections across every panel. For the woman who filters everything through warmth.
story: Crivo (sieve) forged in 18k yellow gold, a wide cuff where angular lattice panels span the wrist with 4.58ct of diamonds marking every crossing. The same celestial screen as its white gold sibling, rendered in warm gold that reads as solar rather than stellar. An Estelar cuff of unapologetic scale.

name: Estelar Giro White Bangle
description: Giro (orbit) in 18k white gold, a slimmer lattice bangle with diamond intersections wrapping the full circumference. For the woman who completes every orbit she begins.
story: Giro (orbit) set in 18k white gold, a slimmer lattice bangle where geometric panels wrap the full circumference with 4.27ct of diamonds at each node. The form is continuous, no beginning or end, an orbital path rendered in precious metal. An Estelar bangle for the wrist that never stops moving.

name: Estelar Giro Yellow Bangle
description: Giro (orbit) in 18k yellow gold, a slimmer lattice bangle with diamond intersections wrapping the full circumference. For the woman who moves in golden circles.
story: Giro (orbit) set in 18k yellow gold, a slimmer lattice bangle where geometric panels wrap the full circumference with 4.81ct of diamonds. The warm gold sibling of the Giro White, rendering the same continuous path in solar tones. An Estelar bangle that reads as perpetual motion in gold.

name: Luminus Pulso Rose Cuff
description: Pulso (pulse) in 18k rose gold, a fine cuff carrying a beat of diamond light. For the woman fully alive.
story: Pulso (pulse) in 18k rose gold, a cuff where 0.30 carats of diamonds run a clean line of light around the wrist like a pulse you can see. Life made visible. A Luminus bracelet for the woman who is more awake and more alive than anyone else in the room.

name: Luminus Pulso White Cuff
description: Pulso (pulse) in 18k white gold, a cuff with a clean beat of diamond light. For the woman with a steady pulse.
story: Pulso (pulse) in 18k white gold, a cuff where 0.38 carats of diamonds run a clean bright line around the wrist like a steady pulse. The proof of a life fully lived. A Luminus bracelet for the woman whose calm hides how much is moving underneath.

name: Luminus Pulso Yellow Cuff
description: Pulso (pulse) in 18k yellow gold, a warm cuff with a beat of diamond light. For the woman who keeps the room alive.
story: Pulso (pulse) in 18k yellow gold, a cuff where 0.38 carats of diamonds run a warm line of light around the wrist like a pulse keeping time. The heartbeat the whole room runs on. A Luminus bracelet for the woman whose energy is the heartbeat the whole room runs on.

name: Luminus Marca White Cuff
description: Marca (mark) in 18k white gold, a cuff bearing a clean line of diamond light. For the woman who leaves her mark.
story: Marca (a mark) in 18k white gold, a cuff where 0.38 carats of diamonds run a clean defining line of light around the wrist. The sign that says she was here. A Luminus bracelet for the woman who leaves a lasting mark on every place she passes through.

name: Luminus Marca Yellow Cuff
description: Marca (mark) in 18k yellow gold, a warm cuff with a line of diamond light. For the woman whose mark stays.
story: Marca (a mark) in 18k yellow gold, a cuff where 0.35 carats of diamonds run a warm defining line of light around the wrist. The mark that does not fade. A Luminus bracelet for the woman whose presence is remembered long after she has gone.

name: Mirage Verso Rosa Cuff
description: Verso (facing) in 18k rose gold, morganite clusters facing each other across an open cuff. Diamonds along the band. For the woman whose warmth never wavers.
story: Verso (facing) wrapping in 18k rose gold, morganite trillion clusters at each open end with 0.47 carats of diamonds along the band. Two blooms facing each other where the pulse beats.

name: Mirage Verso Azul Cuff
description: Verso (facing) in 18k white gold, aquamarine clusters facing each other across an open cuff. Cool blue at the wrist. For the woman who stays cool when it matters.
story: Verso (facing) circling in 18k white gold, aquamarine trillion clusters at each open end with 0.46 carats of diamonds. Blue facing blue across the pulse point, cool over warm.

name: Onsa Fera Direita Earrings
description: Fera Direita (right beast) in 18k yellow gold, articulated chain with green tourmaline. Right ear. Onsa for the woman who brings the forest wherever she goes.
story: Fera Direita (right beast) dropping in 18k yellow gold, articulated links with green tourmaline and 1.02 carats of diamonds. The jungle color carried by the jaguar chain, descending along the right ear.

name: Onsa Garra Direita Earrings
description: Garra Direita (right claw) in 18k yellow gold, articulated chain dropping toward the shoulder with rhodolite, the jaguar descending, right side. Onsa single earring, sold separately because for some women one is enough.
story: Garra Direita (right claw) falling in 18k yellow gold, articulated chain with green tourmaline. The other side of the jaguar, completing the presence.

name: Onsa Caça Direita Earrings
description: Caça Direita (right hunt) in 18k yellow and white gold, green tourmaline in articulated form, the jaguar beginning its pursuit. Onsa right earring for the woman who moves first.
story: Caça Direita (right hunt) descending in 18k yellow and white gold, green tourmaline with 0.90 carats of diamonds in articulated chain. Two metals for the two phases of the hunt: patience and strike.

name: Bahia Elos Bracelet
description: Elos (links) - Palm frond links in yellow gold bracelet. Diamonds connecting each leaf. Bahia bracelet like a chain that grew from the earth. For wrists that appreciate organic architecture.
story: Elos (links) formed in 18k yellow gold, sculpted fronds joined together around the wrist. 1.30 carats of diamonds at each connection. Canopy for the wrist.

name: Bahia Vergel Bracelet
description: Vergel (garden) in 18k yellow gold, a leaf wreath bracelet with diamond accents. For the woman who carries a garden on her wrist.
story: Vergel (garden) set in 18k yellow gold, a link bracelet where gold leaf forms interlock with 1.92ct of diamonds to create a continuous wreath. The form reads as a walled garden on the wrist. A Bahia bracelet of golden abundance.

name: Bahia Shore Bangle
description: Shore in 18k yellow gold, a slim open cuff scattered with diamonds like foam on sand. For the woman at the edge of more.
story: Shore in 18k yellow gold, a slender open cuff with 0.78 carats of diamonds scattered along its line like foam left by the last wave. The everyday piece with the long view. A Bahia bangle for the woman who keeps one eye on the horizon and never misses a step.
